transcript.narrator_intro: Listen to a conversation between a woman and a man.

dialogue.speaker: F1
dialogue.text: Are you going to the science club meeting after class?

dialogue.speaker: M1
dialogue.text: Yes. They're demonstrating a new robotics project, and I'm really interested in it.

transcript.question_intro: Why is the man attending the meeting?

questions.prompt: Why is the man attending the meeting?

choices.text: To sign up for a chemistry class.

questions.explanation: He says the club is demonstrating a new robotics project.
questions.evidence: They're demonstrating a new robotics project.
